rationale: Educ. Code §51.008 governs deposit of higher education institution receipts into the state treasury. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13, so no conflict arises from increasing the homestead exemption amount.
quote: The governing board of every state institution of higher education shall deposit in the state treasury all cash receipts accruing to any college or university under its control
_note: No relationship between this statute and the proposed homestead exemption change; §51.008 concerns higher education depository mechanics, not K-12 school finance or property tax.
